basic_details.job_title: NAeL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 28 Operator & Junior Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Naini Aerospace Limited (NAeL), a wholly owned subsidiary of HAL, has released its Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 notification (Advertisement No. NAeL/Rectt./26/02) inviting online applications for 28 posts across Operator SS and Junior Assistant categories on a Fixed Term Employment (FTE) basis of 4 years. The online application window opened on 27 June 2026 and closes on 17 July 2026. All posts are based at Naini, Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh.

application_fee.details: Candidates from the UR, OBC, and EWS categories must pay a non-refundable application fee of ₹200 (plus applicable bank charges) at the time of online application. | The fee once paid is not refunded under any circumstances, even if the application is rejected or the candidate is found ineligible. Verify all eligibility criteria before paying.

age_limit.details: Understanding the exact qualification required for each post is essential before applying. Candidates holding higher qualifications than what is prescribed are not eligible and will be rejected at any stage. | Part-time, distance education, correspondence, e-learning, or private qualifications are not accepted. All qualifications must be completed on or before 31 May 2026. 1 year of experience in the relevant functional area is an added advantage for Junior Assistant posts. | The upper age limit for this recruitment is 28 years as on 31 May 2026 for UR and EWS candidates. Candidates wondering about relaxations can note the following: | Maximum age with all relaxations combined: 55 years (56 years for PwBD candidates).

qualification.details: Understanding the exact qualification required for each post is essential before applying. Candidates holding higher qualifications than what is prescribed are not eligible and will be rejected at any stage. | Post Required Qualification Operator SS (Electronics Mechanic) 2-year Regular/Full-time ITI (NTC) after 10th Standard in Electronics Mechanic trade Operator SS (Fitter) 2-year Regular/Full-time ITI (NTC) after 10th Standard in Fitter trade Operator SS (Electrician) 2-year Regular/Full-time ITI (NTC) after 10th Standard in Electrician trade Junior Assistant (IMM) Full-time B.Com or B.Sc from a recognised university with Proficiency Certificate in Computer (min. 6 months) OR Full-time BCA Junior Assistant (HR) Full-time BA / B.Sc / BBA / BSW from a recognised university with Proficiency Certificate in Typing / Stenography / Computer (min. 6 months) Junior Assistant (Finance) Full-time B.Com or BBA from a recognised university with Proficiency Certificate in Computer (min. 6 months) Junior Assistant (IT) Full-time BCA or B.Sc (Computer / IT) from a recognised university | Part-time, distance education, correspondence, e-learning, or private qualifications are not accepted. All qualifications must be completed on or before 31 May 2026. 1 year of experience in the relevant functional area is an added advantage for Junior Assistant posts.

salary_details.details: The remuneration structure for NAeL FTE posts is fixed and includes basic pay, dearness allowance, HRA, and EPF contributions. The approximate CTC figures give candidates a clear picture of take-home expectations. | Additional Benefits: Casual Leave, Earned Leave (2.5 days/month), 4 sets of uniforms once in 2 years, stitching charges, shoe allowance, meal allowance, conveyance allowance, Gratuity (after 1 year of service), and Maternity Benefits for female employees as per applicable law.

selection_process: The selection for NAeL Non-Executive posts is based entirely on a Written Test
followed by Document Verification and a Pre-Employment Medical Examination. There is no interview stage.
Step 1: Shortlisting for Written Test Applications are screened based on the percentage of marks in the qualifying examination:
UR / OBC-NCL / EWS: 60% and above SC / ST / PwBD: 50% and above
If the number of eligible candidates is large
NAeL may raise the cut-off percentage for shortlisting.
Prayagraj) The written test is 2.5 hours long and consists of MCQs with no negative marking:
Minimum qualifying marks: 50% in the Written Test. SC / ST / PwBD candidates get a 10% relaxation in qualifying marks.

Step 3: Document Verification Candidates who qualify the Written Test are called for Document Verification in order of merit. The number of candidates called is limited to the number of advertised posts (category-wise). Travelling allowance (Sleeper/2nd Class train/bus fare by shortest route) is reimbursed on production of travel proof.
Step 4: Pre-Employment Medical Examination Provisionally selected candidates must clear a medical examination as per NAeL's prescribed standards. No relaxation in health standards is permitted.
Step 5: Final Offer of Engagement Final engagement is issued after receipt of a satisfactory Medical Report and verification of Character & Antecedents from the concerned authorities.
how_to_apply: All applications must be submitted online only through the official NAeL website. No applications by post, email, or in person are accepted.
Visit the official NAeL website: https://www.nael.co.in
Click on the Recruitment or Careers section and find Advertisement No. NAeL/Rectt./26/02.
Register with a valid email ID and mobile number. Ex-Apprentices of NAeL: use your Contract No., Apprenticeship No., Date of Birth, and training period to authenticate.
Ex-Apprentices of NAeL: use your Contract No., Apprenticeship No., Date of Birth, and training period to authenticate.
Fill in the online application form carefully - provide all qualifications (completed and ongoing).
Upload the required documents (photograph, signature, certificates).
Pay the application fee of ₹200 (if applicable) via the available payment gateway.
Submit the application. Download and save the Registration/Acknowledgement Form with your application reference number for future use.
Download your Admit Card from the NAeL website from 31 July 2026 onwards.
Important: A candidate can apply for one post only. Once submitted, applications cannot be altered. Keep your email ID active - all communications are sent via email.

content_sections.heading: NAeL Recruitment 2026 - Quick Summary
content_sections.text: Download NAeL Non-Executive Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.information: Operator SS (Electronics Mechanic / Fitter / Electrician), Junior Assistant (IMM / HR / Finance / IT)

content_sections.heading: NAeL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates should save all key dates to avoid missing any stage of this recruitment. The written test result is expected to be announced just four days after the exam, making the timeline quite fast. All dates are tentative and subject to change. Check the official NAeL website for updates.

content_sections.heading: NAeL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Breakdown - Post-Wise and Category-Wise
content_sections.text: NAeL is recruiting across two broad cadres - Operator SS (technical/trade) and Junior Assistant (clerical/functional). The total vacancy count is 28 posts, distributed as follows: Includes shortfall vacancies from previous cycles. The number of vacancies is tentative and may be revised at management's discretion.

content_sections.heading: NAeL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria - Qualification and Age Limit
content_sections.text: Understanding the exact qualification required for each post is essential before applying. Candidates holding higher qualifications than what is prescribed are not eligible and will be rejected at any stage. Part-time, distance education, correspondence, e-learning, or private qualifications are not accepted. All qualifications must be completed on or before 31 May 2026. 1 year of experience in the relevant functional area is an added advantage for Junior Assistant posts. The upper age limit for this recruitment is 28 years as on 31 May 2026 for UR and EWS candidates. Candidates wondering about relaxations can note the following: Maximum age with all relaxations combined: 55 years (56 years for PwBD candidates).

rows.required_qualification: 2-year Regular/Full-time ITI (NTC) after 10th Standard in Electronics Mechanic trade
2-year Regular/Full-time ITI (NTC) after 10th Standard in Fitter trade
2-year Regular/Full-time ITI (NTC) after 10th Standard in Electrician trade
Full-time B.Com or B.Sc from a recognised university with Proficiency Certificate in Computer (min. 6 months) OR Full-time BCA
Full-time BA / B.Sc / BBA / BSW from a recognised university with Proficiency Certificate in Typing / Stenography / Computer (min. 6 months)
Full-time B.Com or BBA from a recognised university with Proficiency Certificate in Computer (min. 6 months)
Full-time BCA or B.Sc (Computer / IT) from a recognised university

rows.age_relaxation: Service period minus actual age, not exceeding prescribed limit by more than 3 years
1 year per completed year of experience, max age 35 years
Up to 45 years (50 for SC/ST; 48 for OBC)

content_sections.heading: NAeL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: Candidates from the UR, OBC, and EWS categories must pay a non-refundable application fee of ₹200 (plus applicable bank charges) at the time of online application. The fee once paid is not refunded under any circumstances, even if the application is rejected or the candidate is found ineligible. Verify all eligibility criteria before paying.

rows.category: Ex-Apprentices of NAeL & HAL nearby divisions
Candidates sponsored by Employment Exchange / Sainik Board

content_sections.heading: NAeL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Pay Scale - CTC and Allowances
content_sections.text: The remuneration structure for NAeL FTE posts is fixed and includes basic pay, dearness allowance, HRA, and EPF contributions. The approximate CTC figures give candidates a clear picture of take-home expectations. Additional Benefits: Casual Leave, Earned Leave (2.5 days/month), 4 sets of uniforms once in 2 years, stitching charges, shoe allowance, meal allowance, conveyance allowance, Gratuity (after 1 year of service), and Maternity Benefits for female employees as per applicable law.

rows.component: DA (471.2% of Basic, as on 01 April 2026)
DA (471.2% of Basic, as on 01 April 2026)

content_sections.heading: NAeL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process - Step-by-Step
content_sections.text: The selection for NAeL Non-Executive posts is based entirely on a Written Test, followed by Document Verification and a Pre-Employment Medical Examination. There is no interview stage. Step 1: Shortlisting for Written Test Applications are screened based on the percentage of marks in the qualifying examination: UR / OBC-NCL / EWS: 60% and above SC / ST / PwBD: 50% and above If the number of eligible candidates is large, NAeL may raise the cut-off percentage for shortlisting. Step 2: Written Test (23 August 2026, Prayagraj) The written test is 2.5 hours long and consists of MCQs with no negative marking: Minimum qualifying marks: 50% in the Written Test. SC / ST / PwBD candidates get a 10% relaxation in qualifying marks. Step 3: Document Verification Candidates who qualify the Written Test are called for Document Verification in order of merit. The number of candidates called is limited to the number of advertised posts (category-wise). Travelling allowance (Sleeper/2nd Class train/bus fare by shortest route) is reimbursed on production of travel proof. Step 4: Pre-Employment Medical Examination Provisionally selected candidates must clear a medical examination as per NAeL's prescribed standards. No relaxation in health standards is permitted. Step 5: Final Offer of Engagement Final engagement is issued after receipt of a satisfactory Medical Report and verification of Character & Antecedents from the concerned authorities.

content_sections.heading: NAeL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 - How to Apply - Step-by-Step Guide
content_sections.text: All applications must be submitted online only through the official NAeL website. No applications by post, email, or in person are accepted. Important: A candidate can apply for one post only. Once submitted, applications cannot be altered. Keep your email ID active - all communications are sent via email.

content_sections.heading: NAeL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 - Document Requirements for Document Verification
content_sections.text: Candidates shortlisted after the Written Test must bring the following to the Document Verification stage: Admit Card + valid Original Photo ID (Aadhaar / PAN / Passport / Voter ID / Driving Licence) Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets Date of birth proof (10th certificate) Caste Certificate in Central Government format (SC/ST/OBC - not older than 6 months for OBC-NCL) EWS Certificate (Income & Asset Certificate in Central Government format) PwBD Disability Certificate (40% or more disability) from Competent Authority Experience Certificate on company letterhead (for candidates claiming age relaxation) No Objection Certificate (NOC) if currently employed in Central/State Govt. / PSU Ex-Serviceman Discharge Certificate (if applicable)

content_sections.heading: NAeL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 - Troubleshooting & Common Mistakes to Avoid
content_sections.text: Even well-prepared candidates sometimes make preventable errors. Here are the most common pitfalls specific to this recruitment: Applying with a distance/correspondence/part-time degree - These qualifications are explicitly disqualified. Only full-time, regular programmes are accepted. Possessing a higher qualification - Candidates with degrees higher than what is prescribed (e.g., a B.Tech applying for Operator SS) will be rejected. This rule is strictly enforced. Not disclosing ongoing courses - The notification requires you to declare all qualifications being currently pursued. Omitting this can lead to cancellation. Submitting multiple applications - Only one application per candidate is allowed. Duplicate submissions are rejected. Paying the fee without checking eligibility - The fee is non-refundable. Verify age, qualification, and category before paying. OBC-NCL certificate older than 6 months - OBC candidates must submit a fresh Non-Creamy Layer certificate in Central Government format at document verification. Not keeping the email ID active - NAeL sends all communications (admit card, result, DV date) only via email. Use a regularly monitored address. Confusing the age cut-off date - The age calculation reference date is 31 May 2026, not the application date or exam date. Candidates employed elsewhere forgetting the NOC - Government/PSU employees who are provisionally selected must bring a No Objection Certificate or their candidature is cancelled. Assuming permanent employment - This is a Fixed Term Engagement for exactly 4 years. It does not lead to regular/permanent employment.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Naini Aerospace recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Naini Aerospace recruitment is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Operator SS / Junior Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 28 vacancies announced by Naini Aerospace for the Operator SS and Junior Assistant positions. These are distributed across various specializations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this Naini Aerospace recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for Operator SS posts is approximately Rs. 4.56 Lakh per annum, while for Junior Assistant posts, it is approximately Rs. 4.96 Lakh per annum, inclusive of EPF contributions by the employer.

faq.question: Q5. Where is Naini Aerospace located?
faq.answer: Naini Aerospace is located in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 211010.

faq.question: Q6. What is the official website of Naini Aerospace?
faq.answer: The official website of Naini Aerospace is https://nael.co.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contractual positions at Naini Aerospace.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Naini Aerospace recruitment is NAeL/Rectt./26/02.

faq.question: Q10. What are the different specializations for Operator SS posts?
faq.answer: The Operator SS posts are available in Electronics Mechanic, Fitter, and Electrician specializations.
